name: White Fudge (Woolard)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook 1 cup of sugar and water to soft ball stage.
2. Fold into stiffly beaten egg whites.
3. In another kettle, cook the remaining sugar, corn syrup, and a little water to hard ball stage at the same time.
4. Pour this mixture into the first one.
5. Add vanilla and beat until it begins to harden.
6. Add nuts if desired and pour onto a buttered plate.
7. Cut into squares.
